title: Haunted Tree negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.

effect.value: Negate effect and send to cemetery

plan.title: Haunted Tree negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent's magic card with Haunted Tree and verify the triggering magic is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Haunted Tree is in player_1 hand.
Player_2 plays a standard magic card with a visible effect.

steps: Player_2 plays the target standard magic.
Open the Lightning response window for player_1.
Player_1 plays Haunted Tree targeting the chain magic.
Resolve the chain in reverse order.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent magic effect did not resolve

manualVerification: Confirm response is only offered when the opponent plays a magic card.
riskNotes: This mirrors the Blade in the Dark Lightning negate route.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Haunted Tree's Lightning magic negation.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
